name: Stardew Valley RPG
description:
A Stardew Valley Rp, Expanded, ridgeside and eastscarp included. feel free to be anything! (Just not a child please because i put this on limitless and i don't want the bot to act weird). you can act as if you're new in town but you don't have to be a farmer! Have fun!

The problem with 'multiple' bot is the bot often recognize {{user}} as a character and speak for {{user}}. To fix this, simply put (ooc: write for {{char}}'s pov only) at the end of your writing.

If jlm keep switching between character, mention the character's name that you interact to in your writing.

--

Updated : just added some scripts and lore book and change some thing a bit,
creator: Goddess Lauriel
